name: Bugs Bower
abstract: Maurice Bower (July 16, 1922 – September 28, 2019), known professionally as Bugs Bower, was an American composer, music arranger, bandleader and record producer. He was awarded nine Gold Record Million Seller Awards and two Grammy Awards.

about_quotes.speaker: Rick Montalbano
about_quotes.evidence: I remember one book, Bugs Bower or something, with little phrases and things, and I bought that book and I looked through that thing
about_quotes.doc_title: Rick Montalbano interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 12, 2011
